title: U.S.-Iran Deal’s Vague Language Comes Back to Haunt Peace Efforts
summary_full: The deal called for Iran to “make arrangements” for the passage of ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran has interpreted that to mean it can designate which routes ships take.
summary_public: The deal called for Iran to “make arrangements” for the passage of ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran has interpreted that to mean it can designate which routes ships take.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has interpreted that to mean it can designate which routes ships take.
